LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF INGRID DE LEON CHUN NOTICE OF MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT AND FOR RECOVERY OF FEES AND COSTS: PLAINTIFF INGRID ELEUTERIO DE LEON CHUN'S UNOPPOSED "MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT AND FOR RECOVERY OF FEES AND COSTS" IS GRANTED. (SEE CCP 664.6.) DEFENDANT ROBERTO HERNANDEZ IS ORDERED TO PAY PLAINTIFF $14,800, PLUS $1,665 IN ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS IN CONNECTION WITH FILING THIS MOTION. ORDER SIGNED. Notice Of Motion To Enforce Settlement And For Recovery Of Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Sep-11-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF INGRID DE LEON CHUN Notice Of Motion To Enforce Settlement And For Recovery Of Fees And Costs:

Plaintiff Ingrid Eleuterio De Leon Chun's unopposed "motion to enforce settlement and for recovery of fees and costs" is granted. (See CCP 664.6.) Defendant Roberto Hernandez is ordered to pay plaintiff $14,800, plus $1,665 in attorney fees and costs in connection with filing this motion.

order signed.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
